article.title: Azure NetApp Files for EDA workloads: From revolution to breakthrough at scale
article.summary: Last year, we outlined how Azure NetApp Files helped reshape silicon design by delivering the low-latency, high-throughput storage required for Electronic Design Automation (EDA) workloads at cloud scale. Since then, we have continued to extend performance and scalability. Today, we are advancing that progress with another significant step forward. Modern semiconductor design is defined by scale. Thousands of concurrent EDA jobs spanning simulation, synthesis, and verification run continuously against shared datasets, where even small variations in storage latency can ripple across entire design cycles. For many teams, this has historically limited how far EDA workflows could scale in the cloud. That constraint is now changing. Azure NetApp Files (ANF) is redefining what is possible for ED
article.title_zh: Azure NetApp Files 用於 EDA 工作負載：從革命到大規模突破
article.summary_zh: Azure NetApp Files 透過提供雲端規模上 Electronic Design Automation 工作負載所需的低延遲、高吞吐量儲存，不斷擴展效能和可擴充性。

article.title: US Weighs Chip Tariffs to Spur Domestic Growth, Trade Chief Says
article.summary: The Trump administration continues to weigh US tariffs on imported semiconductors to boost domestic chip manufacturing, though there are no immediate plans to impose any new levies, US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said.
article.title_zh: 美國考慮晶片關稅刺激國內成長，貿易首席談判代表稱
article.summary_zh: 川普政府持續評估對進口半導體課徵關稅以提升國內晶片製造，但暫無立即計畫。

article.title: Huawei develops 122TB SSD with new packaging tech to sidestep US sanctions on 3D NAND chips — Chinese firm develops proprietary tech to cram more NAND dies in a smaller footprint
article.summary: Huawei developed a new die-on-board packaging, which directly mounted NAND dies on the SSD PCB, to get around the sanctions that prevented it from acquiring high-layer-count 3D NAND chips that used American tech. This allowed the company to pile in more 3D NAND on its storage devices without the limitations of traditional NAND packaging to deliver higher capacity using less dense 3D NAND dies.
article.title_zh: 華為開發 122TB SSD 採用新封裝技術繞過美國對 3D NAND 晶片的制裁——中國公司開發專有技術在更小空間內堆疊更多 NAND 晶片
article.summary_zh: 華為開發了新的芯片內板封裝技術，將 NAND 晶片直接裝載在 SSD PCB 上，以規避防止其獲得採用美國技術的高層數 3D NAND 晶片的制裁，從而在儲存裝置中堆疊更多 3D NAND。

article.title: China’s shark finning could lead to US seafood sanctions
article.summary: For migrant workers trapped onboard Chinese distant water fishing fleets, cutting the fins off sharks as they writhe violently on rusted decks in the Indian Ocean isn’t accidental. It’s an intentional and lucrative act that marks the start of a bloody half-a-billion-dollar offshore supply chain, tacitly supported by Beijing yet covertly concealed from port inspectors globally. The Center for Biological Diversity, a nonprofit focused on the protection of endangered species, filed a formal petition this month requesting the U.S. government potentially sanction China for failing to meet American shark conservation standards. Shark populations have declined by more than 70 percent since 1970, with more than one-third of all shark and ray species now threatened with extinction. Yet each year, C
article.title_zh: 中國的鯊魚鰭貿易可能導致美國海產品制裁
article.summary_zh: 對於被困在中國遠洋漁船上的移工來說，在印度洋生銹甲板上割下劇烈掙扎的鯊魚魚鰭並非意外，而是一項意圖明確且獲利豐厚的行為，標誌著一條價值數億美元的離岸供應鏈的開始。

article.title: AI cost crisis hits tech giants as employee 'tokenmaxxing' backfires, sparking corporate pullback at Microsoft, Meta, and Amazon — agentic AI eats up to 1000x more tokens than standard AI
article.summary: Agentic AI is consuming so many tokens that it's draining AI budgets way faster than expected. Jevons Paradox rings true 161 years after it was coined.
article.title_zh: AI 成本危機衝擊科技巨頭，員工「tokenmaxxing」適得其反，引發 Microsoft、Meta 和 Amazon 的企業撤退——代理型 AI 消耗的 token 比標準 AI 多 1000 倍
article.summary_zh: 代理型 AI 消耗大量 token，導致 AI 預算耗盡速度遠超預期；Jevons 悖論在 161 年後再次驗證。

article.title: AI is starting to out-design chip engineers in narrow areas as LLMs accelerate software chip design tool development — "There is still a lot of human guidance" says Berkley researcher
article.summary: We interview researchers and chip design experts to explore where and how AI is being used during the process, and what trials and tribulations come alongside the usage of the nascent technology in their workflows.
article.title_zh: AI 開始在特定領域超越晶片工程師，LLM 加速軟體晶片設計工具開發 — Berkeley 研究員表示「仍需大量人工指導」
article.summary_zh: 我們採訪了研究人員和晶片設計專家，探討 AI 在晶片設計流程中的應用位置、方式，以及這項新興技術帶來的試煉與挑戰。

article.title: Save 30% on a 12-month Proton Unlimited VPN sub to secure an all-in-one privacy suite for under $110 — big price drop on service that includes a no-logs VPN with servers in 145 countries, 500GB of cloud storage, encrypted mail, password manager, and more
article.summary: Grab a 30% saving on a 12 month subscription to Proton Unlimited for a limited time only.
article.title_zh: Proton Unlimited VPN 12 個月訂閱優惠 30% 享受全功能隱私套件，不到 $110 — 涵蓋無日誌 VPN、145 國伺服器、500GB 雲端儲存、加密郵件、密碼管理器等功能的大幅折扣
article.summary_zh: 限時優惠，Proton Unlimited 12 個月訂閱享受 30% 折扣。

article.title: Imec Says AI Scaling Needs More Orchestration Across Research, Design, Manufacturing
article.summary: I love it when tech leaders use simple analogies to illustrate the complexity and scale of what the semiconductor industry is facing right now. A strong example came during the opening keynote by imec CEO
article.title_zh: Imec 表示 AI 擴展需要跨研究、設計、製造的更多協調

article.title: Why enterprise AI keeps stalling — and how data streaming could unlock it
article.summary: Enterprise AI is running into a problem. But it has more to do with data infrastructure than model quality. The snag is that most businesses still keep data fragmented across databases, SaaS tools, warehouses, and internal platforms, with security controls layered on top to protect each surface area separately.  That works fine in a batch world, but it becomes a serious constraint once agents and AI applications have to reason across live business data, Sean Falconer , head of AI at data streaming platform Confluent, tells The New Stack. “Most AI projects fail before they even reach a single customer because the data layer breaks down,”   Falconer says. “Teams have the models and mandate, but security risks and fragmented data stop them from shipping.” Con
article.title_zh: 為什麼企業 AI 不斷停滯——數據流處理如何能解鎖它
article.summary_zh: 企業 AI 遇到的問題主要源於數據基礎設施而非模型質量，因為大多數企業的數據仍然分散在各個數據庫、SaaS 工具和倉庫中。

article.title: Gemini app for Mac adding ‘Spark’ agent and voice control this summer
article.summary: At I/O 2026, Google previewed two major features for the Gemini app on macOS that are coming this summer. more…
article.title_zh: Mac版Gemini應用新增「Spark」代理和語音控制功能（今年夏季推出）
article.summary_zh: Google在I/O 2026上為macOS版Gemini應用預覽了兩項即將在今年夏季推出的主要功能。

article.title: Google’s got disco icons for your Pixel phone, and everyone’s already taking them too far
article.summary: TL;DR Disco-ified version of popular app icons have been going a little viral lately. Earlier this week, Android head Sameer Samat teased the possibility of an official icon pack. Today those disco icons go official as a custom style for the Pixel Launcher. Disco has found itself mired in controversy for longer than many smartphone users have probably been alive (ask your parents about Disco Demolition Night ). So it probably shouldn’t have been any surprise that Spotify users’ reactions to the app’s (temporary) new disco ball icon were mixed, at best. Where some people see controversy, others see opportunity, and Google’s rounding this week out by just leaning in to the disco icon fad as hard as it possibly can. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
article.title_zh: Google為您的Pixel手機推出迪斯科圖標，大家已經使用過度
article.summary_zh: 流行應用圖標的迪斯科版本近來有點走紅。本週初，Android負責人Sameer Samat暗示正式圖標包的可能性。今天這些迪斯科圖標正式推出為Pixel Launcher的自訂風格。

article.title: Samsung's $400,000 payout for memory workers sparks revolt as other divisions get only $4,000, fueling intentional production slowdowns — internal resentment disrupts packaging operations, major AI chip project decisions to a complete halt
article.summary: It’s understood that meetings are being canceled across Samsung's non-memory and shared business units.
article.title_zh: Samsung 記憶體員工獲得 40 萬美元賠償引發revolt，其他部門僅獲 4,000 美元，引發故意減產——內部不滿擾亂包裝業務，重大 AI 晶片項目決策完全停止
article.summary_zh: 據悉，Samsung 非記憶體和共享業務部門的會議正被大規模取消。

article.title: Wi-Fi controlled hacking USB cable stealthily packs in a microcontroller, microSD storage, and more — cable executes remote payload execution, keystroke injection, and more, but is 'built for makers, developers, enthusiasts, and cybersecurity learners'
article.summary: A device that 'looks like a normal USB cable' but packs in an ESP32-S3 microcontroller, micro SD card storage, and Wi-Fi capabilities has enjoyed great success on Kickstarter.
article.title_zh: Wi-Fi 控制駭客 USB 線隱藏微控制器、microSD 儲存等——線纜可執行遠端負載執行、按鍵注入等功能，但「為製造者、開發者、愛好者和網路安全學習者而設計」
article.summary_zh: 一款看似普通 USB 線但內含 ESP32-S3 微控制器、micro SD 卡儲存和 Wi-Fi 功能的裝置在 Kickstarter 上獲得巨大成功。

article.title: SpaceX Challenges AI Rivals For Control of $26.5 Trillion AI Market
article.summary: Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and AI company is effectively basing its pitch for the biggest IPO in history on the idea that it can capture a huge share of the market from the likes of OpenAI, Anthropic PBC and Alphabet Inc.’s AI systems: technology that will eventually automate large swaths of white-collar and administrative work, creating a massive market for software that can perform digital tasks traditionally handled by humans. Nancy Tengler, Laffer Tengler Investments joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the flurry of IPO's. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: SpaceX 挑戰 AI 對手爭奪 26.5 萬億美元 AI 市場控制權
article.summary_zh: Elon Musk 的火箭、衛星和 AI 公司在歷史性規模最大 IPO 中的核心論點是它可以從 OpenAI、Anthropic 等 AI 系統廠商手中奪取巨大市場份額。
